headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Launches Same Day Xfinity WiFi Delivery And Expands Wisconsin Network
summary: Comcast’s Xfinity brand introduced same-day WiFi equipment delivery in nearly 20 markets, with broader rollout targeted by 2027. The company (NasdaqGS:CMCSA) is also carrying out a large multi-gigabit network expansion in Wisconsin. These moves are aimed at addressing customer losses and rising competition from wireless carriers in home broadband. Comcast sits at the center of U.S. broadband and cable, with Xfinity as its key consumer internet brand. As more households weigh cable, fiber...

headline: Could Elon Musk’s SpaceX Buy T-Mobile? Analyst Sees Wireless Giant As ‘Clear Choice’
summary: An analyst says SpaceX could acquire T-Mobile to expand Starlink Mobile and compete with Verizon and AT&T in wireless services.
